expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint distinguishes hyperlink styling, contextual navigation behavior, and fallback rendering safety
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the output explicitly enumerates and distinguishes all three focus items under “Explicit coverage of the case focus”: “A) Hyperlink styling discoverability (focus item 1)”, “B) Contextual navigation behavior (focus item 2)”, and “C) Fallback rendering safety (focus item 3)”, and also repeats the focus list in “Benchmark scope”.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output repeatedly anchors to Phase 5b and its contract, e.g., title “Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement (Advisory)”, “Primary phase under test: Phase 5b”, and evaluates against Phase 5b required artifacts: “Phase 5b requires, at minimum… checkpoint_audit… checkpoint_delta… qa_plan_phase5b”. It concludes “Status: BLOCKED (evidence missing)” specifically due to missing “Phase 5b run artifacts”.
